title: GLOBE LIFE INC. DECLARES DIVIDEND
text: MCKINNEY, Texas , Sept. 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Globe Life Inc. (NYSE: GL) announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $.2250 per share on all of the outstanding common stock of the Company held of record as of close of business of the Company's transfer agent on  October 6, 2023.

title: The 7 Best Warren Buffett Stocks to Buy Now: September 2023
text: If we're going to get right down to it, banking on the best Warren Buffett stocks comes down to leveraging decades of experience. Unlike, say, financial luminaries on YouTube, the Oracle of Omaha has seen it all – bull markets, bear markets and whatever the heck we're currently in.

title: Here's Why You Should Invest in Globe Life (GL) Stock Now
text: Globe Life's (GL) higher premiums, new investment yields, strong liquidity position, favorable estimates and effective capital deployment poise it well for growth.
